The '''Forgotten Spire''' was a manufactured spire that rose from the rocky plains of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]].<ref name="SWG" /> The origins of this monument were lost to the ages,<ref name="Sony">{{SonyCite|url=content.jsp?page=Star%20Wars%20Galaxies:%20Bestiary%20-%20Dathomir|text=Star Wars Galaxies: Bestiary – Dathomir}}</ref> though it bore a striking resemblance to the [[Forgotten Spires]] on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].<ref name="SWG" />

[[Rancor pygmy|Rancor pygmies]] were spotted near the Forgotten Spire after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="Sony" />
